reason: Browser use feature enables agents to open browsers, navigate to URLs, and retrieve page information successfully
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully showing Super Agent interface with three agents listed in sidebar
Clicked on "QA-20260428-213011-srpo" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened displaying chat interface and agent configuration options
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the input field — Message appeared in the input field with proper formatting
Clicked the "Send message" button — Message was sent successfully, agent began processing with status showing "working"
Waited up to 3 minutes for response — Agent completed work in 7 seconds and returned response

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly states "The page title is "Example Domain"." with two completed tool calls: "Open Browser https://example.com" and "Browser Command $ get title"
